acceptance_criteria: docs/compat.md Akkoma row shows all applicable checkmarks; Pleroma Content-Type with charset is accepted; HTTP signatures from Pleroma verify correctly; emoji in posts don't cause parse errors
description: Test and fix compatibility with Akkoma/Pleroma. Known quirks: Content-Type includes charset parameter (already handled in inbox), may use older HTTP signature format, emoji handling differences. Test full compat matrix rows.
design: Test against a live Akkoma instance. Known Akkoma quirks from spec: Content-Type: application/activity+json; charset=utf-8. Also check for hs2019 signature algorithm (should not accept per spec). Document findings.
title: Akkoma / Pleroma compatibility testing and bug fixes
